meta.description: User-facing Workframe error phrases. Keys map to API error codes, HTTP status, or pattern matchers.

fallback.hint: Try again in a moment. If it keeps happening, contact your admin.

internal.hint: Try again. If it persists, an admin can check server logs.

400.hint: Check the fields and try again.

401.message: Session expired or not signed in.
401.hint: Refresh the page and sign in again.

403.message: You do not have permission for this action.

404.hint: It may have been removed or renamed.

413.message: Upload is too large for the server.
413.hint: Use a smaller file (avatars: under 256 KB; images: compress or resize first).

415.hint: Try again from the latest UI build.

429.hint: Wait a moment and try again.

500.hint: Check API logs if this keeps happening.

install_closed.hint: Open the main app or finish user onboarding in Settings.

oauth_start_failed.message: Could not start provider sign-in inside the gateway.
oauth_start_failed.hint: Retry in a moment. If it keeps failing, ask an admin to rebuild the workframe-supervisor container.

raw_container_exec_disabled.message: Provider sign-in is blocked on this secure stack.
raw_container_exec_disabled.hint: Rebuild workframe-api and workframe-supervisor from the latest release, then try again.

device_oauth_start_failed.message: Could not start device sign-in for this provider.
device_oauth_start_failed.hint: Retry, or connect with an API key instead.

invalid_device_oauth_provider.message: This provider does not support device sign-in on this stack.
invalid_device_oauth_provider.hint: Use an API key or a different connect method.

email_required.hint: Enter your email address before continuing.

forbidden.message: You do not have permission for this action.
forbidden.hint: Sign in as the workspace admin, or finish the Admin step before saving Workframe settings.

room_access_denied.hint: Ask a workspace admin for access.

room_not_found.hint: Refresh the room list or open another chat.

room_not_agent_chat.message: This room is not an agent chat.

profile_not_installed.message: Agent profile is not installed on this stack.

avatar_too_large.hint: Use a square image under 256 KB (JPEG or PNG).

avatar_type.message: Avatar must be an image file.
avatar_type.hint: Use JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP.

provider_empty_reply.message: The model provider returned no reply.
provider_empty_reply.hint: Check your API key, credits, and model selection in Settings.

model_unavailable.message: The selected model is not available on your provider right now.
model_unavailable.hint: Pick a different model — free models on OpenRouter rotate often.

model_invalid_id.message: That model ID is not valid for your provider.
model_invalid_id.hint: Open the model picker and select a listed model.

provider_invalid_key.message: Your API key was rejected by the provider.
provider_invalid_key.hint: Reset the key at the integration, then paste it again under Settings → Integrations.

provider_no_credits.message: Your provider account has no credits remaining.
provider_no_credits.hint: Add credits at your provider billing page, then try again.

invalid_lease.message: Your session credential expired before the model replied.

concierge_add_keys.message: Connect an LLM integration to enable chat.
concierge_add_keys.hint: OpenRouter is the fastest path — paste your API key under Settings → Integrations.

concierge_change_model.message: Choose which model this agent uses.
concierge_change_model.hint: Open the model picker and select a model your provider supports.

no_llm_provider_for_user.message: No LLM integration is connected for your account.
no_llm_provider_for_user.hint: Add an OpenRouter or other LLM key under Settings → Integrations.

no_llm_provider.hint: Add an API key under Settings → Integrations.

supervisor_unavailable.hint: On the server: cd infra/compose/workframe && docker compose up -d

private_workspace.hint: Contact your Workframe admin for an invite link.

request_failed.hint: Try again in a moment. If it keeps happening, contact your admin.

runtime_profile_permission_denied.message: Workframe could not prepare your agent workspace on disk.
runtime_profile_permission_denied.hint: An admin should restart the stack or fix permissions on the Agents data volume.

runtime_profile_create_failed.message: Workframe could not create your personal agent profile.
runtime_profile_create_failed.hint: Try again in a moment. If it persists, restart Workframe or contact your admin.

runtime_profile_api_config_failed.message: Workframe could not start the agent API for this profile.
runtime_profile_api_config_failed.hint: Check that the Hermes gateway is running and try again.

runtime_profile_bootstrap_failed.message: Workframe could not finish setting up this agent profile.
runtime_profile_bootstrap_failed.hint: Try again or pick another agent from the crew list.

session_bootstrap_failed.message: Workframe could not start this chat session.
session_bootstrap_failed.hint: Refresh the page or open another agent room.

network_unreachable.message: Could not reach the Workframe API.
network_unreachable.hint: Use http://127.0.0.1:18644 for dogfood, confirm Docker is up, or sign in again if the session expired.

provider_rejected.hint: Check your API key and the model selected in Settings.

model_not_available.message: The selected model is not available.
model_not_available.hint: Pick another model in Settings or confirm your provider account supports it.

agent_no_reply.hint: The model gateway may have rejected the request — try sending again. If it persists, check Settings → Integrations and the model in Agent Settings.

agent_error_unknown.message: The agent reported an error without details.
agent_error_unknown.hint: Check integration keys, model selection, and gateway logs.

agent_provider_unreachable.message: The agent could not reach the model provider.
agent_provider_unreachable.hint: Check API keys in Settings → Integrations and the model in Agent Settings.

patterns.match: Connection refused|Errno 111|profile api did not become healthy|profile api unavailable
too large|entity too large|payload too large|413
no llm provider|openrouter_api_key not set|provider configured|no_llm_provider_for_user

session_bootstrap.message: Workframe could not start this chat session.
session_bootstrap.hint: Refresh the page or open another agent room.

new_session.message: Workframe could not start a new session.
new_session.hint: Try again or refresh the page.

send_message.message: Your message could not be sent.
send_message.hint: Check your connection and try again.
